packets.title: Seam-local evaluator and four-fixture fail-closed gate
packets.summary: Freeze mismatch vocabulary, derivation record, fail-closed rule, and four deterministic seam fixtures for fabricated or contradicted safe-harbor anchors.
packets.success_condition: Fixture regression passes 4/4 and fabricated safe-harbor anchors fail closed.

packets.title: Wire the seam gate into the live Stage 2 handoff path
packets.summary: Integrate `evaluate_derivation_seam()` into the live `build_stage2_handoff()` path as the kernel-facing fail-closed gate so bad upstream derivations stop before downstream routing.
packets.success_condition: Live Stage 2 handoff uses the seam evaluator or an equivalent fail-closed sidecar, preserving frozen downstream contracts while blocking fabricated safe-harbor anchors.

packets.title: Close out and promote seam hardening
packets.summary: After live integration is verified, route the program to human promotion/closure instead of silently looping to another packet.
packets.success_condition: Manifest is exhausted, verifier passes, and the program pauses at human review for promotion or closure.
